calculationSteps.label: Kernel Weights
calculationSteps.explanation: 32 filters of size 3x3 convolving over 3 RGB channels. Stride 2 halves resolution.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

calculationSteps.label: Depthwise weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Apply one 3x3 filter per channel independently (groups = channels), which separates spatial convolving from channel mixing.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

calculationSteps.label: Projection weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Compresses channel information.

calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

groups.name: Input Stem
groups.description: Standard 3x3 Conv + BN + ReLU6 stem downsampling coordinates to 112x112.

groups.name: Stage 1 Block 1
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=1): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project.

groups.name: Stage 2 Block 1
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project.

groups.name: Stage 2 Block 2
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 3 Block 1
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project.

groups.name: Stage 3 Block 2
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 3 Block 3
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 4 Block 1
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project.

groups.name: Stage 4 Block 2
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 4 Block 3
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 4 Block 4
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 5 Block 1
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project.

groups.name: Stage 5 Block 2
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 5 Block 3
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 6 Block 1
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project.

groups.name: Stage 6 Block 2
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 6 Block 3
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project + skip.

groups.name: Stage 7 Block 1
groups.description: Inverted Bottleneck Block (t=6): 1x1 Expand → 3x3 Depthwise → 1x1 Project.

groups.name: Classifier Head
groups.description: 1x1 Conv + BN + Global Average Pooling + Softmax decision layer.
